{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231509244DE5EC73054B28901888"}"},"total":134},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7439892269194527513","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"有点抗日神剧的意味，当爽文看还是不错的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1732239438,"group_id":"7388086834519084057","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7Bfj3IWajtjAhYo03KTpXLiB2i3Kxj0J9HqD1T1cBX1","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3512316646397642","user_name":"爱吃酱汁蒸肉排的老梁"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3512316646397642","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7388086834519084057","book_info":{"abstract":"江辰穿越到到风筝、伪装者、风声等谍战融合世界，开局成为军统六哥郑耀先的关门弟子。
经过郑耀先的训练后，江辰潜伏回了特高课。
于是一个令人日伪特务闻风丧胆的三面特工出现了。
明家三兄弟：江辰是我的上线，我服了！
郑耀先：江辰是我党的特工之王。
戴老板：委座称江辰可抵十个嫡系师，此言非虚，
土肥圆死前遗言：江辰潜伏成我军将帅，我们根本赢不了。
三年又三年。
江辰已经成为了小鬼子最大的特务头目。
敌国将帅府。
江辰：抗战再不结束，我就成敌国将帅了，成了最大汉奸了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/8408d06fd55c7a65bb56d4780e210e2a","author":"风筝战士","author_id":"","book_id":"7388086834519084057","book_name":"特工：震惊六哥，我成大反派","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7180人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":504,"name":"抗战谍战","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=504&name=抗战谍战&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":507,"name":"谍战","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=507&name=谍战&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7388136297098906648","read_count":"7180","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1008894"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.2","serial_count":"477","tags":"抗战谍战,系统,穿越,开局,谍战,魂穿,都市","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/940339ba61df691b46be2d8134d566d2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779433764&x-signature=m6C40hblHzeDfdKQoA1fQai46B4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"364"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231509244DE5EC73054B28901888"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"
